subcodes.first_line: O jewel of existence! His Excellency Shah Khalil hath written a letter wherein the blessed names are [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جواهر وجود حضرت جلیل شاه خلیل نامه ای مرقوم نموده و نامهای مبارک شما را یک
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
